title: Crispy-Caipira Brazilian Chicken Wrap
description: A light and delicious Brazilian-inspired dish featuring crispy chicken, sweet and tangy glaze, and fresh vegetables, all wrapped in a delicate Brazilian-style ti-leaf wrap.

ingredients.name: ti-leaf wraps
ingredients.notes: also known as Brazilian-style corn tortillas

ingredients.name: glaze ingredients: soy sauce, lime juice, honey

instructions: Season the chicken with salt and pepper, then coat with flour, shaking off excess.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and cook the chicken until browned and crispy, about 5-6 minutes per side.
Transfer the chicken to a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 10-12 minutes, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, prepare the glaze by whisking together soy sauce, lime juice, and honey in a small bowl.
Add the caster sugar to the glaze and whisk until dissolved.
Brush the glaze over the roasted chicken and return to the oven for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Warm the ti-leaf wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by placing a few pieces of roasted chicken onto each wrap, followed by sliced red bell pepper, red onion, and a sprinkle of cilantro (if using).
Drizzle the remaining glaze over the top of each wrap and serve immediately.
